entry.title: New: CR 25-3 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 105, CD1 (2024), to address nonconforming structures and uses damaged, destroyed, or affected by an emergency or disaster declared by proclamation of the Governor or the Mayor, respectively, under Chapter 127A, Hawai‘i Revised Statutes.

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
